title: <div><tt>7. Economic/Weaponized (capital flows, linguistic imperialism, memetic
content:
7. Economic/Weaponized (capital flows, linguistic imperialism, memetic warfare engine)
8. Absurd/Dadaist (deliberately broken, impossible, humorous, anti-monument)

Requirements — you MUST obey all of these:
- Exactly 800–1200 words
- Begin with a single-sentence "elevator pitch" that would make a stranger immediately understand the insanity/genius of your version
- Include at least one completely original invented language or writing system (show 5–10 example "words" or glyphs with translations)
- Include a fatal flaw or internal contradiction that dooms the project (the more poetic/devastating the better)
- End with a short "death scenario" — how this version of the Nexus inevitably collapses or transforms into something else
- Never use the phrases "infinite library", "universal translator", or "babel fish"
- Be as extreme, heretical, or beautiful as your mutation seed demands

Mutation seed for this query: [INSERT 1–8 HERE]
context: From document: You are a visionary designer tasked with creating the ultimate synthesis… — chunk 2 (chunk 2/18)
